message:
fix(hedge): adaptive hedge hardening — input validation, Peak-EWMA max equation, tests

adaptive_hedge.rs:
  Extract duration_nanos_saturating_u64() and decay_nanos() helpers
  to eliminate truncation risk from Duration→u64 conversions. Add
  constructor assertions: decay_factor must be finite in (0,1],
  min_delay must be <= max_delay. Clamp initial delay to [min,max].
  Simplify observe() CAS loop to use explicit Peak-EWMA equation:
    H(t+1) = max(sample, α * H(t))
  instead of the prior if/else branch. Add 5 tests covering the
  max equation, initial clamping, inverted bounds panic, invalid
  decay panic, and u64::MAX duration saturation.

hedge.rs:
  Add window_size() and sample_count() accessors on AdaptiveHedgePolicy
  for observability. Add 2 tests: sliding window latest-samples
  verification and config/next_delay consistency check.

mod.rs:
  Re-export AdaptiveHedgePolicy from combinator module (alphabetical
  ordering in the pub use block).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
